case_title: FIRST ALLIANCE MORTGAGE COMPANY, A CALIF CORP vs. O'NEAL, WILLIE et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O'NEAL, MARY LEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 80 WOOL ST, S.F, CA., SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.

CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PL. REPRESENTED BY DOUGLAS PITCHFORD. DEF. MARY O'NEAL PRESENT W/ANDREW DHEUY AS COUNSEL. DEF. WILLIE O'NEAL IS DECEASED. SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 80 WOOL ST, S.F, CA. - EVICTION STAYED TO 10-29-93 - DEF. WILL ALLOW PHOTOS OF PROPERTY TO BE TAKEN BY PL. BETWEEN TODAY & 10-29-93 & THEN STAY WILL BE EXTENDED TO 1-4-94, MIDNIGHT - ALL RENT & DAMAGES, COSTS & ATTY FEES WVD. - NO FURTHER STAYS WILL BE GIVEN - DEF. WILL LEAVE PREMISES FREE OF ALL OCCUPANTS & IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION - DEF. WAIVES ALL CLAIMS ARISING FROM THE FORECLUSURE. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDMGENT.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST ALLIANCE MORTGAGE COMPANY, A CALIF CORP AS TO DEFENDANT O'NEAL, WILLIE O'NEAL, MARY LEE DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
